name: Warm Spinach with Spicy Dressing (Tdn-9/22/93
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Hot pepper sauce or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the spinach well under running water.
2. Place the still-wet leaves into a 4 cup measure and cover.
3. Microwave on full power until the spinach is just beginning to wilt and soften, about 2 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine the oil, hot pepper sauce, vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and honey in a small bowl and whisk until well mixed.
5. Pat the spinach dry and tip into a medium bowl.
6. Pour on the dressing and toss well.
7. Serve warm, sprinkled with the chives.
